untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking multi-day bar patterns (Tuesday continuation vs reversal, Wednesday reversal following Tuesday reversal, flip-flopping up-down-up-down sequences across specific days of week). No day-of-week or multi-bar memory indicators available in the allowed list. The 55% and 57% probabilities are statistical assertions about future reversals that cannot be encoded as deterministic entry/exit rules without access to day_of_week indicator and lagged multi-bar pattern matching.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a statistical probability claim about day-of-week mean reversion patterns. It requires: (1) day-of-week filtering (Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday), (2) multi-bar sequence memory (tracking whether prior bars were continuations or reversals), and (3) pattern matching (flip-flopping). The allowed indicator set lacks these capabilities. A partial interpretation has been provided using simple reversal logic, but this does not capture the intended multi-day contextual logic or probabilistic thresholds.
